title: Use flexible windows. Finalize only when emotionally clear.
content:
Use flexible windows. Finalize only when emotionally clear.
AI Collaboration
Use prompts that respond to environment/data—not from scratch.
Project Starts
Begin projects through curiosity → let them start you.
Project Ends
Use ritualized decay —let endings be full, not abrupt.
Collaboration
Build systems for duo/triadic intimacy (Channel 59–6).
Break Cycles
Create permission slips to fail publicly, archive truthfully, rebuild mythically.
4. 🧙 Character Engine — Legacy Integration
Each of your gates/channels = a mythic “System Spirit” or “Mask”.
Spirit Name
Source (Gate/Channel)
Function
The Channeler34–20
Embodied creative broadcast
The Weaver3–60
Mutation engine — chaos into form
The Bondmaker59–6
Intimacy architect — relational system shaper
The Arc Starter53–42
Long-form initiation & myth cycle builder
The Fracture-BearerCross of Tension
Tension alchemist, field disruptor
The Pattern RecluseProfile 3/2
